name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: The grey light of dawn was streaming through his window when the thunder of hoofbeats awoke Eddard Stark from his brief, exhausted sleep. He lifted his head from the table to look down into the yard. Below, men in mail and leather and crimson cloaks were making the morning ring to the sound of swords, and riding down mock warriors stuffed with straw. Ned watched Sandor Clegane gallop across the hard-packed ground to drive an iron-tipped lance through a dummy’s head. Canvas ripped and straw exploded as Lannister guardsmen joked and cursed.
blocks.explanation_zh: 黎明马蹄声惊醒Eddard；他看见Sandor与Lannister guards高调操练、刺穿草人头部。
blocks.literary_note_zh: mock warriors的head被lance刺爆，是公开演练也是即将真实流血的视觉预演；brave show带有Eddard轻蔑判断。
blocks.background_zh: **Lannister household guard：** crimson cloaks直属Lannister权力，不等同由city treasury与Janos指挥的gold cloaks。

blocks.original_text: Is this brave show for my benefit? he wondered. If so, Cersei was a greater fool than he’d imagined. Damn her, he thought, why is the woman not fled? I have given her chance after chance . . .
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard怀疑演武是向自己示威，也不解Cersei为何在获得多次逃走机会后仍留在城中。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard把Cersei未逃解释为foolish，显示他仍假定自己的warning定义了她的最佳选择，没有充分考虑她会进攻。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: The morning was overcast and grim. Ned broke his fast with his daughters and Septa Mordane. Sansa, still disconsolate, stared sullenly at her food and refused to eat, but Arya wolfed down everything that was set in front of her. “Syrio says we have time for one last lesson before we take ship this evening,” she said. “Can I, Father? All my things are packed.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 阴沉早餐中Sansa拒食，Arya却大吃并请求启航前再上一次Syrio的课。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sansa不食与Arya wolfed down以食欲对照心理状态；evening ship仍让Eddard相信撤离计划尚可执行。
blocks.background_zh: **撤离计划：** Wind Witch原定当晚载Sansa、Arya及household离开King’s Landing，Tomard负责escort。

blocks.original_text: “A short lesson, and make certain you leave yourself time to bathe and change. I want you ready to leave by midday, is that understood?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard同意短课，但要求Arya中午前洗好、换装、准备离开。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 黎明演武与家庭早餐并置：Eddard准备送女儿离城，却仍无法向Sansa说明Joffrey危险。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “By midday,” Arya said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Arya重复期限表示明白。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 黎明演武与家庭早餐并置：Eddard准备送女儿离城，却仍无法向Sansa说明Joffrey危险。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Sansa looked up from her food. “If she can have a dancing lesson, why won’t you let me say farewell to Prince Joffrey?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa拿Arya获准上课作比较，再次请求向Joffrey告别。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 黎明演武与家庭早餐并置：Eddard准备送女儿离城，却仍无法向Sansa说明Joffrey危险。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “I would gladly go with her, Lord Eddard,” Septa Mordane offered. “There would be no question of her missing the ship.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Mordane愿陪Sansa前往并保证不误船。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 黎明演武与家庭早餐并置：Eddard准备送女儿离城，却仍无法向Sansa说明Joffrey危险。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “It would not be wise for you to go to Joffrey right now, Sansa. I’m sorry.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard只说现在见Joffrey不明智，没有揭露危险原因。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 不说明paternity与政变风险是保护也是信息隔离；Sansa只感受到任意禁止，无法按真实危险行动。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Sansa’s eyes filled with tears. “But why?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa含泪追问原因。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 黎明演武与家庭早餐并置：Eddard准备送女儿离城，却仍无法向Sansa说明Joffrey危险。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “Sansa, your lord father knows best,” Septa Mordane said. “You are not to question his decisions.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Mordane以父权和服从制止Sansa质疑。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 黎明演武与家庭早餐并置：Eddard准备送女儿离城，却仍无法向Sansa说明Joffrey危险。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “It’s not fair!” Sansa pushed back from her table, knocked over her chair, and ran weeping from the solar.
blocks.explanation_zh: Sansa喊不公平，撞倒椅子哭着跑出solar。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 黎明演武与家庭早餐并置：Eddard准备送女儿离城，却仍无法向Sansa说明Joffrey危险。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Septa Mordane rose, but Ned gestured her back to her seat. “Let her go, Septa. I will try to make her understand when we are all safely back in Winterfell.” The septa bowed her head and sat down to finish her breakfast.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard阻止Mordane追赶，打算等全家安全回Winterfell再解释。
blocks.literary_note_zh: when safely back in Winterfell把解释推迟到安全之后，但安全本身依赖她们先服从不理解的命令。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: It was an hour later when Grand Maester Pycelle came to Eddard Stark in his solar. His shoulders slumped, as if the weight of the great maester’s chain around his neck had become too great to bear. “My lord,” he said, “King Robert is gone. The gods give him rest.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 一小时后Pycelle神情沉重地来报Robert已经死亡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert死讯到来，Eddard压下悲痛召集council；Renly已南逃，他试图凭sealed letter先建立regency。
blocks.background_zh: **Robert death：** boar造成的大范围感染伤已被Pycelle判断无可救治；Robert临终任Eddard摄政。

blocks.original_text: “No,” Ned answered. “He hated rest. The gods give him love and laughter, and the joy of righteous battle.” It was strange how empty he felt. He had been expecting the visit, and yet with those words, something died within him. He would have given all his titles for the freedom to weep . . . but he was Robert’s Hand, and the hour he dreaded had come. “Be so good as to summon the members of the council here to my solar,” he told Pycelle. The Tower of the Hand was as secure as he and Tomard could make it; he could not say the same for the council chambers.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard用love、laughter和righteous battle替代rest悼念朋友；他压下哭泣，立即召集council到更安全的Tower of the Hand。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 标题带来的公共角色压制私人哀悼；Eddard没有时间完成grief，Robert death立刻成为constitutional deadline。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “My lord?” Pycelle blinked. “Surely the affairs of the kingdom will keep till the morrow, when our grief is not so fresh.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle建议悲痛新鲜时把国事推迟到明日。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Pycelle的明日建议表面合礼，实际会把整夜准备时间交给掌控royal household的一方；本段不证明他故意拖延。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Ned was quiet but firm. “I fear we must convene at once.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard坚持必须立刻开会。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert死讯到来，Eddard压下悲痛召集council；Renly已南逃，他试图凭sealed letter先建立regency。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Pycelle bowed. “As the Hand commands.” He called his servants and sent them running, then gratefully accepted Ned’s offer of a chair and a cup of sweet beer.
blocks.explanation_zh: Pycelle服从召集，同时接受座椅和sweet beer休息。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert死讯到来，Eddard压下悲痛召集council；Renly已南逃，他试图凭sealed letter先建立regency。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Ser Barristan Selmy was the first to answer the summons, immaculate in white cloak and enameled scales. “My lords,” he said, “my place is beside the young king now. Pray give me leave to attend him.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan最先到场，却请求回到他认定的young king身边。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Barristan说young king而非Joffrey，先以office和assumed succession定位忠诚。
blocks.background_zh: **Kingsguard duty：** Barristan须保护reigning monarch；争议恰在Joffrey是否已合法成为king。

blocks.original_text: “Your place is here, Ser Barristan,” Ned told him.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard要求Barristan留在council。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert死讯到来，Eddard压下悲痛召集council；Renly已南逃，他试图凭sealed letter先建立regency。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Littlefinger came next, still garbed in the blue velvets and silver mockingbird cape he had worn the night previous, his boots dusty from riding. “My lords,” he said, smiling at nothing in particular before he turned to Ned. “That little task you set me is accomplished, Lord Eddard.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger穿昨夜衣服、boots带尘而来，报告Eddard交给他的任务已经完成。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dusty boots与昨夜服饰是Littlefinger一夜活动的物证；accomplished只证明他声称完成，尚不证明gold cloaks忠于谁。
blocks.background_zh: **Littlefinger task：** Eddard请他用六千gold确保Janos、officers与City Watch支持自己。

blocks.original_text: Varys entered in a wash of lavender, pink from his bath, his plump face scrubbed and freshly powdered, his soft slippers all but soundless. “The little birds sing a grievous song today,” he said as he seated himself. “The realm weeps. Shall we begin?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys沐浴整洁后无声入内，以little birds的悲歌宣告realm哀悼并催促开始。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Varys洗浴、粉面与轻步和房中疲惫者形成反差；grievous song把情报网络拟作公共哀悼。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “When Lord Renly arrives,” Ned said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard说要等Renly到场。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert死讯到来，Eddard压下悲痛召集council；Renly已南逃，他试图凭sealed letter先建立regency。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Varys gave him a sorrowful look. “I fear Lord Renly has left the city.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Varys告知Renly已经离城。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert死讯到来，Eddard压下悲痛召集council；Renly已南逃，他试图凭sealed letter先建立regency。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “Left the city?” Ned had counted on Renly’s support.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard震惊，因为他原本指望Renly支持。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Robert死讯到来，Eddard压下悲痛召集council；Renly已南逃，他试图凭sealed letter先建立regency。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “He took his leave through a postern gate an hour before dawn, accompanied by Ser Loras Tyrell and some fifty retainers,” Varys told them. “When last seen, they were galloping south in some haste, no doubt bound for Storm’s End or Highgarden.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Renly在黎明前带Loras与约五十retainers从postern gate南逃，可能去Storm’s End或Highgarden。
blocks.literary_note_zh: postern gate、before dawn、in haste显示Renly有预先撤退计划；目的地是Varys推测，不是已确认路线。
blocks.background_zh: **Renly forces：** Renly前夜曾提议集结约百剑控制royal children；被Eddard拒绝后，他带自己核心retinue离城。

blocks.original_text: So much for Renly and his hundred swords. Ned did not like the smell of that, but there was nothing to be done for it. He drew out Robert’s last letter. “The king called me to his side last night and commanded me to record his final words. Lord Renly and Grand Maester Pycelle stood witness as Robert sealed the letter, to be opened by the council after his death. Ser Barristan, if you would be so kind?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard意识到Renly的百剑已不存在，只能出示Robert last letter并说明其seal与witness。
blocks.literary_note_zh: so much for压缩Eddard对一项兵力支柱消失的反应；他感到不祥却因时间已无法补救。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: The Lord Commander of the Kingsguard examined the paper. “King Robert’s seal, and unbroken.” He opened the letter and read. “Lord Eddard Stark is herein named Protector of the Realm, to rule as regent until the heir comes of age.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan验证seal未破，宣读Eddard获任Protector并摄政至heir成年。
blocks.literary_note_zh: letter只写the heir而非Joffrey，延续Eddard上一章的语义改写；Barristan确认的是seal真实性，不是heir身份。
blocks.background_zh: **Robert will：** Eddard将Robert口述的my son Joffrey写成my heir，使文件未明确点名继承者。

blocks.original_text: And as it happens, he is of age, Ned reflected, but he did not give voice to the thought. He trusted neither Pycelle nor Varys, and Ser Barristan was honor-bound to protect and defend the boy he thought his new king. The old knight would not abandon Joffrey easily. The need for deceit was a bitter taste in his mouth, but Ned knew he must tread softly here, must keep his counsel and play the game until he was firmly established as regent. There would be time enough to deal with the succession when Arya and Sansa were safely back in Winterfell, and Lord Stannis had returned to King’s Landing with all his power.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard暗想真正heir Stannis早已成年，却因不信Pycelle、Varys且顾忌Barristan忠于Joffrey而暂不公开，计划先巩固regency、送走女儿并等Stannis带兵回来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard开始play the game并主动deceit，但计划依赖三件未完成事件：regency获确认、女儿离城、Stannis带power抵达。
blocks.background_zh: **Stannis claim：** Eddard已确认Cersei children并非Robert所生，因此认定Robert elder surviving brother Stannis为legal heir。

blocks.original_text: “I would ask this council to confirm me as Lord Protector, as Robert wished,” Ned said, watching their faces, wondering what thoughts hid behind Pycelle’s half-closed eyes, Littlefinger’s lazy half-smile, and the nervous flutter of Varys’s fingers.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard请求council确认其Protector身份，同时观察众人难以读取的表情动作。
blocks.literary_note_zh: half-closed eyes、half-smile、fluttering fingers提供表情却不提供内心，强调council room的信息不对称。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: The door opened. Fat Tom stepped into the solar. “Pardon, my lords, the king’s steward insists . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Fat Tom进门报告royal steward坚持求见。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei抢先召council到throne room并把Joffrey摆上Iron Throne；Eddard因City Watch五倍人数产生安全感。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: The royal steward entered and bowed. “Esteemed lords, the king demands the immediate presence of his small council in the throne room.”
blocks.explanation_zh: steward以‘king’命令small council立刻去throne room。
blocks.literary_note_zh: steward仍称the king，说明Cersei阵营已把Joffrey继位当作完成事实，而非等待council确认。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Ned had expected Cersei to strike quickly; the summons came as no surprise. “The king is dead,” he said, “but we shall go with you nonetheless. Tom, assemble an escort, if you would.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard早料Cersei会迅速行动；他指出Robert已死但同意前往，并命Tomard组织escort。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei抢先召council到throne room并把Joffrey摆上Iron Throne；Eddard因City Watch五倍人数产生安全感。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Littlefinger gave Ned his arm to help him down the steps. Varys, Pycelle, and Ser Barristan followed close behind. A double column of men-at-arms in chainmail and steel helms was waiting outside the tower, eight strong. Grey cloaks snapped in the wind as the guardsmen marched them across the yard. There was no Lannister crimson to be seen, but Ned was reassured by the number of gold cloaks visible on the ramparts and at the gates.
blocks.explanation_zh: Littlefinger扶伤腿的Eddard下楼；八名Stark men护送，城墙与gate上众多gold cloaks使他安心。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard因gold cloaks数量而reassured；读者知道这一安全感完全依赖Littlefinger的交易确实把command交给他。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Janos Slynt met them at the door to the throne room, armored in ornate black-and-gold plate, with a high-crested helm under one arm. The Commander bowed stiffly. His men pushed open the great oaken doors, twenty feet tall and banded with bronze.
blocks.explanation_zh: 全甲Janos Slynt在throne room门前迎接，City Watch打开巨大oak doors。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei抢先召council到throne room并把Joffrey摆上Iron Throne；Eddard因City Watch五倍人数产生安全感。
blocks.background_zh: **Janos Slynt：** City Watch commander；Eddard相信Littlefinger已通过gold买到他的支持。

blocks.original_text: The royal steward led them in. “All hail His Grace, Joffrey of the Houses Baratheon and Lannister, the First of his Name, King of the Andals and the Rhoynar and the First Men, Lord of the Seven Kingdoms and Protector of the Realm,” he sang out.
blocks.explanation_zh: royal steward用完整王号宣布Joffrey为king及Protector。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 完整royal style通过口头仪式制造合法性；其中Protector title也抢先占据Robert letter赋给Eddard的称号。
blocks.background_zh: **royal style：** 长串称号是monarch正式身份宣告；说出称号本身不解决血统争议，却能制造既成礼仪。

blocks.original_text: It was a long walk to the far end of the hall, where Joffrey waited atop the Iron Throne. Supported by Littlefinger, Ned Stark slowly limped and hopped toward the boy who called himself king. The others followed. The first time he had come this way, he had been on horseback, sword in hand, and the Targaryen dragons had watched from the walls as he forced Jaime Lannister down from the throne. He wondered if Joffrey would step down quite so easily.
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard在Littlefinger支撑下走向Iron Throne，回想上次曾带剑逼Jaime离座，怀疑Joffrey是否也会轻易退下。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 过去Jaime坐throne的记忆把两次政权转换叠合；上次Eddard有victorious army，这次只能跛行并倚靠broker。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Five knights of the Kingsguard—all but Ser Jaime and Ser Barristan—were arrayed in a crescent around the base of the throne. They were in full armor, enameled steel from helm to heel, long pale cloaks over their shoulders, shining white shields strapped to their left arms. Cersei Lannister and her two younger children stood behind Ser Boros and Ser Meryn. The queen wore a gown of sea-green silk, trimmed with Myrish lace as pale as foam. On her finger was a golden ring with an emerald the size of a pigeon’s egg, on her head a matching tiara.
blocks.explanation_zh: 五名Kingsguard全甲列阵，Cersei与两个年幼children站在其后，queen以华丽silk、emerald和tiara展示地位。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei的服饰不是战甲，却用royal color、jewels与position构成政治armor。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Above them, Prince Joffrey sat amidst the barbs and spikes in a cloth-of-gold doublet and a red satin cape. Sandor Clegane was stationed at the foot of the throne’s steep narrow stair. He wore mail and soot-grey plate and his snarling dog’s-head helm.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey穿融合lion与stag象征的王服坐在尖刺间，Sandor全副武装守在阶梯下。
blocks.literary_note_zh: lion/stag各五十的cape用纹章宣称Lannister与Baratheon结合合法；Iron Throne barbs让少年身体置于危险权力象征中。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Behind the throne, twenty Lannister guardsmen waited with longswords hanging from their belts. Crimson cloaks draped their shoulders and steel lions crested their helms. But Littlefinger had kept his promise; all along the walls, in front of Robert’s tapestries with their scenes of hunt and battle, the gold-cloaked ranks of the City Watch stood stiffly to attention, each man’s hand clasped around the haft of an eight-foot-long spear tipped in black iron. They outnumbered the Lannisters five to one.
blocks.explanation_zh: throne后有二十Lannister guards，但Littlefinger兑现表面承诺：City Watch沿墙列阵，人数五比一压过Lannisters。
blocks.literary_note_zh: five to one建立Eddard的数量优势错觉；人数只有在command loyalty可靠时才等于力量。
blocks.background_zh: **force map：** hall中约二十Lannister guards，五名Kingsguard与Sandor；City Watch约百人，表面数量占优。

blocks.original_text: Ned’s leg was a blaze of pain by the time he stopped. He kept a hand on Littlefinger’s shoulder to help support his weight.
blocks.explanation_zh: 长距离行走使Eddard伤腿剧痛，只能继续扶Littlefinger站立。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他字面上靠Littlefinger支撑身体，也在政治上靠其购买的Watch，双重依赖在背叛前被明确可视化。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Joffrey stood. His red satin cape was patterned in gold thread; fifty roaring lions to one side, fifty prancing stags to the other. “I command the council to make all the necessary arrangements for my coronation,” the boy proclaimed. “I wish to be crowned within the fortnight. Today I shall accept oaths of fealty from my loyal councillors.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey命council筹备两周内coronation，并要求councillors当日宣誓效忠。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey先要求coronation与fealty，把自己作为king的结论置于任何succession审议之前。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: Ned produced Robert’s letter. “Lord Varys, be so kind as to show this to my lady of Lannister.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard拿出Robert letter，请Varys交给Cersei。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey要求fealty，Cersei撕毁Robert letter；Eddard公开Stannis继承权后，双方互指treason并拔剑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: The eunuch carried the letter to Cersei. The queen glanced at the words. “Protector of the Realm,” she read. “Is this meant to be your shield, my lord? A piece of paper?” She ripped the letter in half, ripped the halves in quarters, and let the pieces flutter to the floor.
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei嘲笑一张paper不能成为shield，当众把授权撕碎撒在地上。
blocks.literary_note_zh: paper/shield对照把legal authority的弱点具体化：没有执行者时，真实seal也可被手撕毁。
blocks.background_zh: **seal与enforcement：** king seal可证明命令真实，但paper无法自己指挥guards；authority需要institutions承认并执行。

blocks.original_text: “Those were the king’s words,” Ser Barristan said, shocked.
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan因Robert words遭毁而震惊抗议。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Barristan的shock证明他尊重Robert command，却尚未自动转化为替Eddard对抗new king。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “We have a new king now,” Cersei Lannister replied. “Lord Eddard, when last we spoke, you gave me some counsel. Allow me to return the courtesy. Bend the knee, my lord. Bend the knee and swear fealty to my son, and we shall allow you to step down as Hand and live out your days in the grey waste you call home.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei说已有new king，反过来劝Eddard跪拜Joffrey，以辞去Hand、平安返北作为交换。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Cersei给的选择复制Eddard此前给她的逃生机会，却把条件改为公开承认Joffrey和政治自我放逐。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “Would that I could,” Ned said grimly. If she was so determined to force the issue here and now, she left him no choice. “Your son has no claim to the throne he sits. Lord Stannis is Robert’s true heir.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard拒绝，公开宣称Joffrey无权继位，Stannis才是Robert true heir。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard只说no claim与Stannis heir，未在hall公开children paternity；这保留部分隐私，却无法避免双方变成互斥主权主张。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “Liar!” Joffrey screamed, his face reddening.
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey涨红脸尖叫Eddard撒谎。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey要求fealty，Cersei撕毁Robert letter；Eddard公开Stannis继承权后，双方互指treason并拔剑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “Mother, what does he mean?” Princess Myrcella asked the queen plaintively. “Isn’t Joff the king now?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Myrcella不解地问母亲Joffrey难道不是king。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Myrcella的普通疑问让children并非权力设计者这一事实短暂显现。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “You condemn yourself with your own mouth, Lord Stark,” said Cersei Lannister. “Ser Barristan, seize this traitor.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei把Eddard的继承主张定为自证treason，并命Barristan逮捕他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Joffrey要求fealty，Cersei撕毁Robert letter；Eddard公开Stannis继承权后，双方互指treason并拔剑。
blocks.background_zh: **treason dispute：** 若Joffrey是king，Eddard否认他即treason；若Stannis是heir，Cersei拥立Joffrey才是usurpation。

blocks.original_text: The Lord Commander of the Kingsguard hesitated. In the blink of an eye he was surrounded by Stark guardsmen, bare steel in their mailed fists.
blocks.explanation_zh: Barristan犹豫，Stark guards立刻拔剑围住他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Barristan一瞬hesitation是制度忠诚冲突：Robert last command、Joffrey apparent kingship、Cersei arrest order彼此不兼容。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “And now the treason moves from words to deeds,” Cersei said. “Do you think Ser Barristan stands alone, my lord?” With an ominous rasp of metal on metal, the Hound drew his longsword. The knights of the Kingsguard and twenty Lannister guardsmen in crimson cloaks moved to support him.
blocks.explanation_zh: Cersei把拔剑称为从言语到行动的treason；Sandor、Kingsguard与Lannister guards同步迎战。
blocks.literary_note_zh: treason的定义取决于谁已是合法sovereign；双方都把对方武力称为叛乱，并用兵器把法律争论变成事实。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “Kill him!” the boy king screamed down from the Iron Throne. “Kill all of them, I command it!”
blocks.explanation_zh: Joffrey从throne上命令杀死Eddard及其所有人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard命City Watch拘押queen且避免伤害，但Janos反向屠杀Stark guards，Littlefinger以Eddard dagger完成背叛。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “You leave me no choice,” Ned told Cersei Lannister. He called out to Janos Slynt. “Commander, take the queen and her children into custody. Do them no harm, but escort them back to the royal apartments and keep them there, under guard.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard命Janos以City Watch拘押Cersei和children，强调不得伤害，只需软禁看守。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard仍下令no harm，保持对children的保护边界；但custody本身正是他此前拒绝Renly时不愿先做的事。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “Men of the Watch!” Janos Slynt shouted, donning his helm. A hundred gold cloaks leveled their spears and closed.
blocks.explanation_zh: Janos戴盔下令，百名gold cloaks平举长矛包围。
blocks.literary_note_zh: closed没有立即标明朝谁合围，延迟一个段落维持Eddard与读者对忠诚方向的悬念。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: “I want no bloodshed,” Ned told the queen. “Tell your men to lay down their swords, and no one need—”
blocks.explanation_zh: Eddard仍要求避免流血，劝Cersei让部下放下武器，但话未说完。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard命City Watch拘押queen且避免伤害，但Janos反向屠杀Stark guards，Littlefinger以Eddard dagger完成背叛。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: With a single sharp thrust, the nearest gold cloak drove his spear into Tomard’s back. Fat Tom’s blade dropped from nerveless fingers as the wet red point burst out through his ribs, piercing leather and mail. He was dead before his sword hit the floor.
blocks.explanation_zh: 最近的gold cloak突然从背后刺穿Tomard，表明City Watch真正攻击的是Stark side。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 长句被破折号打断后立刻出现spear thrust，形式上让暴力切断Eddard的no bloodshed愿望。
blocks.background_zh: **当前可知：** City Watch并未执行Eddard custody order，而是按Janos command攻击Stark men；更早交易细节仍未知。

blocks.original_text: Ned’s shout came far too late. Janos Slynt himself slashed open Varly’s throat. Cayn whirled, steel flashing, drove back the nearest spearman with a flurry of blows; for an instant it looked as though he might cut his way free. Then the Hound was on him. Sandor Clegane’s first cut took off Cayn’s sword hand at the wrist; his second drove him to his knees and opened him from shoulder to breastbone.
blocks.explanation_zh: Janos亲手割开Varly喉咙；Cayn短暂反抗后被Sandor斩手并致命劈开胸肩。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Janos亲自动手证明倒戈是command decision而非单兵误会；Cayn的短暂英勇无法改变兵力结构。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。

blocks.original_text: As his men died around him, Littlefinger slid Ned’s dagger from its sheath and shoved it up under his chin. His smile was apologetic. “I did warn you not to trust me, you know.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Stark men被杀时Littlefinger抽出Eddard自己的dagger抵住其喉下，带着歉意提醒自己早警告过不可相信他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard曾坚持dagger象征sharp right and wrong，如今它被Littlefinger反用；apologetic smile把礼貌、亲密距离与致命背叛压在一起。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Robert死后的继承争议、Eddard信息限制及各支武装的实际command。
